About

Hi, I’m He Gu. Welcome to my corner of the web — a self-hosted, GitHub-powered Jekyll blog built on my own domain.

In this final sanctuary of digital space, I hope to share fragments of my life, reflections on learning, and thoughts from my work. It’s a place for quiet thinking, honest writing, and personal growth — away from the noise, close to the heart.

Thanks for stopping by.

  • 何故
  • comitist@gmail.com

何故小站，分享技术、生活与随笔。
